description: Update scanner backward-compatibility shims to include all 18 agents (6 missing: Thiel, DuanYongping, ZhangLei, LiLu, DanBin, Serenity)
steps: In scanner/__init__.py: Add imports and __all__ entries for ThielAgent, DuanYongpingAgent, ZhangLeiAgent, LiLuAgent, DanBinAgent, SerenityAgent from their respective augur.personas.* modules.

In scanner/personas/__init__.py: Add imports for the 6 missing agents (ThielAgent, DuanYongpingAgent, ZhangLeiAgent, LiLuAgent, DanBinAgent, SerenityAgent) following the same pattern as existing imports.
Create scanner/personas/serenity.py as a backward-compat shim: re-export from augur.personas.serenity following the exact same pattern as scanner/personas/thiel.py (which already exists).
Add test in tests/test_iteration5.py to verify all 18 agents can be imported from scanner and scanner.personas modules.
acceptance_criteria: All 18 agents are importable from scanner module
All 18 agents are importable from scanner.personas module
scanner/personas/serenity.py exists as a backward-compat shim
verification: python3 -c 'from scanner import SerenityAgent, ThielAgent, DuanYongpingAgent, ZhangLeiAgent, LiLuAgent, DanBinAgent; print("OK")'
